allowed_assumptions: Values may be non-numeric types (causing TypeError).
constraints: Do not change the return type or logic for handled exceptions.
prohibited_claims: Model superiority — not authorized by this task.

public_contract: safe_divide_all(values, divisor) -> list (identical for ZeroDivisionError/TypeError; raises for others)
